description: Returns an orchestrator persona — a Layer-1 router that maps a request type to the fabio command groups, workflows, and best-practices to use, plus decision gates, guardrails, and negative routing. Start here for broad multi-step tasks before drilling into specific commands.

data.name: migration-engineer
data.description: Orchestrator persona for porting workloads to Microsoft Fabric from Azure Synapse, Databricks, HDInsight, and Data Factory.

phases.name: Assessment
phases.action: Inventory source artifacts and identify feature-parity gaps.

delegates_to.notes: dbutils -> notebookutils; Unity Catalog -> Lakehouse; DBFS -> OneLake.

decision_gates: STOP after assessment: present feature-parity gaps and get user sign-off before writing code.

must: Translate storage paths and utility APIs.
prefer: workspace clone / deploy export for bulk moves.
avoid: Deleting source systems before parity is validated.

notes: Personas hold no implementation depth — they route to Layer 3 mechanics (context agent/workflow/best-practices). Available personas: data-engineer, migration-engineer, fabric-admin, rti-engineer, bi-developer. Discover via 'fabio context list' or 'fabio context find <query>'.

query_examples.description: List the request types this persona routes.
See the anti-patterns to avoid for this role.
